candidate_definition_hints.text: [ECCV 2024 - Oral] ACE0 is a learning-based structure-from-motion approach that estimates camera parameters of sets of images by learning a multi-view consistent, implicit scene representation.
This repository contains the code associated to the ACE0 paper:
